scope: PowerShell parser compatibility fix for V802 county boundary manufacturing script

powershellInterpolationFix.issue: PowerShell treats a variable immediately followed by ':' inside an expandable string as an invalid scoped variable reference unless the variable name is delimited.
powershellInterpolationFix.remediation: Delimited the county slug variable with ${slug}: in the coordinate-count validation error string.

staticChecks.purpose: Detect unscoped PowerShell variable interpolation immediately followed by ':'.

runtimeValidation.purpose: Confirm existing Jefferson manufactured boundary remains valid after the parser-only script fix.

environmentNotes: PowerShell was not installed in this Linux container, so script parse/execution was covered by the lightweight interpolation static check and existing Node boundary validation.
